1000637887.english: I asked the engineer team to handle the stage… as for choreography and singing, um…
1000637887.korean: 무대는 엔지니어 팀에 부탁했고... 안무랑 가창은, 음...

1000637889.english: Yeah. I think we can proceed as planned.
1000637889.korean: 응. 예정대로 진행하면 될 것 같아.

1000637890.english: Why do you look so scary…

1000637892.english: What kind of taste could it be… no, that's not important now.
1000637892.korean: 대체 어떤 취향이길... 아니, 지금은 그게 중요한게 아냐.

1000637893.english: First, we'll need an appropriate teacher…

1000637895.english: Yeah. Let me introduce her. This is Draculina, who joined us a little while ago.
1000637895.korean: 응. 소개할게. 얼마 전에 합류한 드라큐리나야.

1000637896.english: Yeah. Draculina will handle vocal training as well as sound equipment setup.
1000637896.korean: 응. 드라큐리나는 보컬 트레이닝에 더불어서 음향 장비 설치를 담당할거야.

1000637897.english: Do you want more tomato juice?

1000637902.english: It's nothing… do you want some tomato juice?

1000637905.english: I have to go. Draculina, don't make it too difficult from the start.
1000637905.korean: 나는 가봐야겠어. 드라큐리나, 처음부터 너무 어렵게 하지는 말고.

1000637912.english: You don't need to hide it anymore.

1000637915.english: What do you think love is?

1000637916.english: Somewhere, a member you can really rely on…

1000637917.english: Huh? Ah, yeah, something like that.

1000637918.english: I-I have some busy work, so I'll be going now…
1000637918.korean: 나, 나는 바쁜 일이 있어서 이만 가볼게...

1000637919.english: What's this… this warm feeling in my chest?
1000637919.korean: 뭐지, 이 가슴 한켠이 훈훈해지는 느낌은.

1000637924.english: Of course, we'll need multiple songs. One alone won't be enough.
1000637924.korean: 당연히 여러 곡이 필요해. 이거 하나로는 어림도 없지.

1000637927.english: As you listen, it might feel okay… Honestly, I'm not sure.
1000637927.korean: 듣다보면 괜찮을 것 같기도 하고... 솔직히 잘 모르겠어.

1000637930.english: I have something prepared for now.

1000637932.english: I'll ask Muse to work on the songs. Everyone's worked hard, so… Ah, right.
1000637932.korean: 곡 작업은 내가 뮤즈한테 의뢰할게. 다들 고생했으니까 좀... 아 맞다.

1000637933.english: I brought an additional plan for the idol debut.
1000637933.korean: 아이돌 데뷔를 위한 추가 기획안을 가져왔어. 바로...

1000637935.english: I wanted to see the other members' stuff quickly too.
1000637935.korean: 다른 대원들 것도 빨리 보고 싶었어.

1000637940.english: Are you saying we'll split into groups of three and each sing a song?
1000637940.korean: 세 명씩 나눠서 각각 노래를 하나씩 부른다는거야?

1000637941.english: Hmm, can we decide the song concept ourselves?
1000637941.korean: 흐음, 곡 컨셉은 저희끼리 정해도 되나요?

1000637942.english: Producer! The three of us will do it!

1000637943.english: Alright, let's go to the meeting!

1000637944.english: - P-49 Sleipnir dragged P-22 Harpyia and EB-48G Hraesvelgr to one side of the room.
1000637944.korean: - 슬레이프니르는 하르페이아와 흐레스벨그를 방 한쪽으로 끌고갔다.

1000637946.english: What are you going to do about that?

1000637948.english: Either I or P/A-00 Griffon should stay by the Commander's side.
1000637948.korean: 저나 그리폰 중에 한 명은 전대장 옆에 있어야 할 것 같아요.

1000637949.english: I glanced over and saw P-49 Sleipnir excitedly chattering to P-22 Harpyia and EB-48G Hraesvelgr about the unit concept he had come up with.
1000637949.korean: - 슬쩍 보니 슬레이프니르는 하르페이아와 흐레스벨그에게 자신이 생각한 유닛 컨셉을 신나게 떠들고 있다.

1000637950.english: Of course it's dangerous. The loser of rock-paper-scissors goes over there—
1000637950.korean: 당연히 위험하지. 가위바위보 해서 진 사람이 저쪽으로-

1000637951.english: Producer! We've decided on our concept! We're going to be a band!
1000637951.korean: 프로듀서! 우리 컨셉 정했어! 밴드 할 거야!

1000637952.english: EB-48G Hraesvelgr even named the unit! Well then, I'll go continue with the meeting!
1000637952.korean: 흐레스벨그가 유닛 명도 지어줬어! 그럼 계속 회의하러갈게!

1000637955.english: P-29 Lindwurm doesn't usually want to say things like this...
1000637955.korean: 린티는 어지간해선 이런 말 하고 싶지 않은데...

1000637956.english: I think something big has happened.

1000637957.english: At my words, the P/A-8 Blackhound let out a deep sigh.
1000637957.korean: - 내 말에 블랙 하운드는 포옥 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000637958.english: It would be cool if I could stand on stage properly without any trouble...
1000637958.korean: 별 일 없이 제대로 무대에 설 수 있다면 멋이야 있겠는데요...

1000637959.english: Haa... I don't know, so figure it out yourself. That's a producer's job, isn't it?
1000637959.korean: 하아... 난 모르겠으니까 알아서 해. 그게 프로듀서의 일이잖아?

1000637960.english: - Fear suddenly struck me at the reaction of the three.

1000637961.english: Even with P-22 Harpyia around, she's too kind and will likely be swayed by P-49 Sleipnir...
1000637961.korean: - 아무리 하르페이아가 있다곤 해도, 너무 착해서 슬레이프니르에게 휘둘릴테고...

1000637962.english: Comparing it to a star... That's a wonderful idea. As expected...!

1000637963.english: Hehe, right? Now all I have to do is practice.
1000637963.korean: 헤헹, 그렇지? 이제 연습만 하면 돼.

1000637964.english: EB-48G Hraesvelgr had already been completely fooled by P-49 Sleipnir's words.
1000637964.korean: - 흐레스벨그는 이미 슬레이프니르의 말에 홀랑 넘어가 버렸다.

1000637965.english: And since it's a band song, it doesn't need choreography!

1000637968.english: The former commander seized control of public sentiment in an instant...!

1000637969.english: ...Actually, does the squad leader have any leadership?

1000637971.english: - I recognized the seriousness of the situation and tried to resolve it somehow, but the sight of the three of them excitedly continuing the meeting looked so enjoyable.
1000637971.korean: - 사태의 심각성을 인지하고 어떻게든 수습해보려 했지만, 신나게 회의를 이어가는 셋의 모습이 너무나 즐거워보였다.

1000637972.english: So, what are you going to do?

1000637974.english: Is there anything you want to do?

1000637975.english: P-29 Lindwurm has everything planned out!

1000637976.english: Come to think of it, I forgot there's one here too.
1000637976.korean: 그러고보니 여기도 한 명 있다는 걸 잊고 있었네. ..

1000637979.english: After dinner, I gave the idol costume I received from Audrey Dreamweaver to P-22 Harpyia.
1000637979.korean: - 저녁 식사를 한 뒤 저녁, 오드리에게 받아온 아이돌 의상을 하르페이아에게 전해주었다.

1000637980.english: ...What should I do, I'm so happy.

1000637983.english: - You seem to have been very conscious of the title "producer" lately...
1000637983.korean: - 얼마전부터 프로듀서라는 호칭에 신경을 많이 쓰던데...

1000637984.english: I guess I should take a look at the book P-22 Harpyia read.
1000637984.korean: - 하르페이아가 읽었다는 책을 나도 한 번 봐야겠군.

1000637988.english: So P-22 Harpyia got her clothes too! They're super pretty!

1000637989.english: Thank you. I just received it.

1000637992.english: P-49 Sleipnir, who had been sending out a glittering eye attack, giggled and blushed.
1000637992.korean: - 반짝이는 눈빛 공격을 보내던 슬레이프니르는 헤헤 웃더니 얼굴을 붉혔다.

1000637995.english: I'll be going now. Thanks for the outfit.

1000637998.english: P-49 Sleipnir looked dazed at P-22 Harpyia's whisper as she left the room.
1000637998.korean: - 방을 나가는 하르페이아의 속삭임에 슬레이프니르는 멍한 얼굴이 되었다.

1000638000.english: I-I-I'm not like that at all! What are you thinking!
1000638000.korean: 그그그그런거 아니거든?! 무슨 생각을 하는 거야!

1000638002.english: No! An idol doing that with a producer is the absolute taboo!
1000638002.korean: 아냐! 아이돌이 프로듀서랑 그러는 건 금기중의 금기라구!

1000638006.english: No way, neither Golden Elixir nor Silver Elixir! Not until I debut as an idol—
1000638006.korean: 금단이고 은단이고 아냐! 아이돌 데뷔하기 전까진-

1000638009.english: As punishment for playing a prank, it was only after quite some time had passed that I was able to calm P-49 Sleipnir down and listen to his story.
1000638009.korean: - 장난을 친 죄로, 한참이 지나서야 슬레이프니르를 진정시키고 이야기를 들어볼 수 있었다.

1000638013.english: The words that came out of P-49 Sleipnir's mouth were not as big a deal as expected.
1000638013.korean: - 슬레이프니르의 입에서 나온 말은, 생각보다 큰 일은 아니었다.

1000638014.english: Yeah, right. It was kind of cool.

1000638015.english: ...because I really want to do a good job.

1000638016.english: "Help me create a wonderful stage." It was nothing special, but P-49 Sleipnir's eyes were more serious than ever.
1000638016.korean: - "멋진 무대를 만들 수 있도록 도와줘." 라는, 특별할 것도 없는 말이었지만 슬레이프니르의 두 눈은 어느 때보다 진지했다.

1000638017.english: Even while I was away, and even after I came back... I caused so much trouble for the other kids.
1000638017.korean: 내가 없는 동안에도, 온 다음에도... 다른 애들한테 너무 피해를 줬어.

1000638020.english: They say there are all sorts of fun things in the world, but the most enjoyable thing I know is performing passionately on stage and receiving cheers from the audience.
1000638020.korean: 세상엔 이것저것 재밌는 게 많다지만, 내가 아는 가장 즐거운 일은 무대 위에서 열정적으로 공연을 하고, 관객들의 환호성을 받는 일이야.

1000638021.english: I wanted to... let the other kids know that too.

1000638023.english: If you show this side of the squad leader often, the other kids will soon see you in a new light.
1000638023.korean: 전대장의 이런 모습을 많이 보여주면, 다른 애들도 곧 전대장을 다시보게 될 거야.

1000638024.english: Because of the admirable feelings welling up inside me, I wanted to hug P-49 Sleipnir and pat his head right away, but I decided to give him advice as a commander rather than a producer for now.
1000638024.korean: - 가슴속에서 피어오르는 기특한 마음 때문에 당장이라도 슬레이프니르를 껴안고 머리를 쓰다듬어주고 싶었지만, 지금은 프로듀서가 아닌 사령관으로서의 조언을 해주기로 했다.

1000638026.english: ...Yeah. I'll do my best! Both as an idol and as a squad leader!

1000638027.english: P-49 Sleipnir, who had revived in an instant as if his somewhat dejected appearance from a moment ago had vanished, sprang to his feet from his seat.
1000638027.korean: - 조금 전의 다소 의기소침한 모습은 어디로 갔는지, 순식간에 부활한 슬레이프니르는 자리에서 벌떡 일어섰다.

1000638028.english: Then I'm going to go practice more!

1000638030.english: Producer, that's a cool thing to say.

1000638031.english: Hehe, yeah. Good luck with your work as a producer, too. I'll be going now.
1000638031.korean: 헤헷, 응. 프로듀서 일도 힘 내. 나도 가볼게.

1000638032.english: After P-22 Harpyia disappeared out the door, I shifted my gaze to the panel.
1000638032.korean: - 하르페이아까지 문 밖으로 사라지고 나서 패널로 시선을 옮겼다.

1000638033.english: - I had missed a message while talking, but a report came in that the restoration of Muse was complete.
1000638033.korean: - 이야기를 나누느라 미처 확인하지 못했던 부재중 메세지로, 뮤즈의 복원이 완료됐다는 보고가 들어와 있었다.

1000638034.english: - Muse has finally been restored, and after undergoing stability checks and inspections, it is now ready to be unveiled.
1000638034.korean: - 마침내 뮤즈가 복원되고, 상태 안정과 검사를 거쳐 만날 수 있게 되었다.

1000638036.english: It seems like it might be similar, but then again, it doesn't...
1000638036.korean: 닮은 것 같기도 하고, 아닌 것 같기도 하고...

1000638040.english: - When I got close to her, I was slightly hurt by the sight of the muse, who was practically on the verge of a fit.
1000638040.korean: - 몸을 가까이하자 거의 경기를 일으키는 뮤즈의 모습에 살짝 마음의 상처를 입고 말았다.

1000638041.english: Producer, how can you just hit on someone you've never met before like that? Look.
1000638041.korean: 프로듀서, 처음 보는 애한테 그렇게 막 들이대면 어떡해? 자, 봐.

1000638042.english: Hi. Do you happen to know me? I used to be a huge fan-
1000638042.korean: 안녕. 혹시 나 알아? 엄청 팬이었는-

1000638047.english: Feeling a small sense of victory at the sight of P-49 Sleipnir trembling, he spoke to Muse again.
1000638047.korean: - 부들부들 떠는 슬레이프니르의 모습에 작은 승리감을 느끼며 다시 뮤즈에게 말을 걸었다.

1000638049.english: - It looked ridiculous because the gap was nearly 3 meters, but Muse looked more stable than before.
1000638049.korean: - 거의 3미터는 간격을 벌린 덕에 웃기는 모양새가 됐지만, 뮤즈는 조금 전보다는 안정되어 보였다.

1000638051.english: - The muse’s gaze, as she gave a barely perceptible nod, remained fixed on the corner of the room.
1000638051.korean: - 보일듯말듯하게 고개를 끄덕이는 뮤즈의 시선은 여전히 방 구석을 향해 있었다.

1000638053.english: Um, like AGS... our initial module was updated periodically. So...
1000638053.korean: 저, 저희들은 AGS처럼... 주기적으로 초기 모듈이 갱신됐어요. 그래서...

1000638054.english: I don't know exactly when it was... but the memory of having made the song itself...
1000638054.korean: 정확히 어떤 시점인지는 모, 모르지만... 곡을 만들었던 기억 자체는...

1000638055.english: I felt a gaze, so I turned my head to see P-49 Sleipnir looking at me with a strange look.
1000638055.korean: - 시선이 느껴져서 고개를 돌려보니, 슬레이프니르가 나를 묘한 눈빛으로 보고 있었다.

1000638056.english: ...You're doing this on purpose, aren't you?

1000638060.english: Seriously, I'm telling you, they lack common sense in strange places...

1000638061.english: Since we only view the past through records, there must be things that look strange to members like P-49 Sleipnir who possess the common sense of the pre-apocalypse era.
1000638061.korean: - 과거에 대한 건 기록으로만 볼 뿐이니, 슬레이프니르처럼 멸망 전의 상식을 갖고 있는 대원들 눈에는 이상하게 보이는 점이 있겠지.

1000638062.english: - Besides, even if they haven't lived for a long time, bioroids are basically restored based on their pre-apocalyptic lifestyles...
1000638062.korean: - 게다가 꼭 오래 살아오지 않아도, 바이오로이드들은 기본적으로 멸망 전의 생활 방식을 기준으로 복원되니...

1000638066.english: - I let out a deep sigh without realizing it at the answer that came out more easily than I expected.
1000638066.korean: - 생각보다 선선히 나오는 대답에 나도모르게 깊은 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000638067.english: - And I realized that I was much more nervous than I expected.
1000638067.korean: - 그리고 내가 예상보다 훨씬 긴장하고 있었다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000638068.english: What Audrey Dreamweaver was talking about was BoRyeon, right?

1000638070.english: By any chance... do you know?

1000638071.english: Ah... yes. You were part of Sky Knights, and you also had a solo career...
1000638071.korean: 아... 네. 스카이나이츠 소속에, 솔로로도 활동하셨던...

1000638073.english: Playing along with P-49 Sleipnir, who was displaying an infuriatingly confident expression, I asked him about something I had been curious about for a while.
1000638073.korean: - 열받게도 자신만만한 표정을 보이는 슬레이프니르에게 적당히 장단을 맞춰주며, 그동안 계속 궁금했던 것을 물어보았다.

1000638077.english: Hey, you know, Muse. Ah, can I call you Muse?
1000638077.korean: 이, 있잖아, 뮤즈. 아, 뮤즈라고 불러도 되지?

1000638079.english: First, let me introduce my kids. When working on a song, figuring out who will sing it is important, right?
1000638079.korean: 일단 우리 애들 소개해줄게. 곡 작업에는 부를 사람을 파악하는 것도 중요하잖아. 맞지?

1000638081.english: And I have a few sketches out of songs, so take a look at those too. They might be helpful.
1000638081.korean: 그리고 내가 몇 개 스케치 해놓은 곡도 있는데, 그것도 한 번 봐봐. 참고가 될지도 모르잖아.

1000638084.english: Do you happen to know how to choreograph too? Hehe, I think I'm better at that— Kyaaah?!
1000638084.korean: 혹시 안무도 짤 줄 알아? 헤헹, 아무래도 그건 내가 더- 꺅?!

1000638085.english: "You mean you didn't dodge on purpose...?" P-49 Sleipnir muttered, and with P-49 Sleipnir sealed in his arms, he asked Muse.
1000638085.korean: - 일부러 안 피한 거라구...? 라고 중얼거리는 슬레이프니르를 품에 봉인한 채 뮤즈에게 물었다.

1000638086.english: The thing is... the equipment is still...

1000638087.english: - The only composition-related equipment in Orca was one type that had been kept a long time ago just in case.
1000638087.korean: - 오르카에 작곡 관련한 장비라고는, 아주 예전에 혹시 몰라서 한 종류 보관하던 것밖에 없었다.

1000638088.english: - And since the Sky Knights are using that right now, I guess I'll have to get a new one.
1000638088.korean: - 그리고 그건 지금 스카이나이츠가 쓰고 있으니까 새로 구해야 되겠군.

1000638089.english: Leave that to me. I'll get it in a flash.

1000638093.english: You've already roughly put together the basics?

1000638094.english: Here, a snack. It’s served to you, so feel free to eat it.
1000638094.korean: 자, 여기 간식. 네 앞으로 나온 거니까 부담없이 먹어도 돼.

1000638096.english: Never mind. Why are you thanking me for something like this?

1000638097.english: By the way, what brings you here...? As for composing...
1000638097.korean: 그런데 무슨 일로 오신 건가요...? 아직 작곡은...

1000638098.english: Producer... I mean, the commander-in-chief leading us asked me to help you, Muse, adapt well.
1000638098.korean: 프로듀서... 그러니까, 우리를 이끄는 총사령관님이 뮤즈 네가 잘 적응하게 도와달라고 하셨거든.

1000638099.english: I also have a personal reason for wanting to get closer to you.

1000638100.english: Ugh... I, I'm sorry... I find it difficult to deal with other people...
1000638100.korean: 으으... 죄, 죄송해요... 저는 다른 분들을 대하는 게 어려워서...

1000638101.english: No, not at all. You don't have to feel too pressured. If you're really uncomfortable, should we come next time?
1000638101.korean: 으응, 아냐. 너무 부담 갖지 않아도 돼. 많이 불편하면 다음에 올까?

1000638102.english: Ah, no. Just... a little further away...

1000638103.english: Ah, so that's what the producer told me about.

1000638104.english: But you're speaking more clearly than I heard.

1000638106.english: Last time... I was so worried...

1000638107.english: Huh? Who? Wasn't it the three of them—the producer, the former commander, and me—who watched it?
1000638107.korean: 응? 누가? 프로듀서하고 전대장하고 셋이서 봤던 거 아니었어?

1000638109.english: Okay, let's leave the former commander aside, but why the producer? He's not the type to make others uncomfortable.
1000638109.korean: 전대장은 그렇다치고, 프로듀서는 왜? 남 불편하게 만드는 사람은 아닌데.

1000638111.english: Ahaha, why is the reaction... uh...

1000638113.english: No way... on the very first day...?

1000638114.english: ......! N-n-no, it's not like that, I'm just... doing whatever I want...!
1000638114.korean: ......! 아아아아뇨, 그런 게 아니라 그냥, 제 멋대로...!

1000638119.english: To think you'd mistake that for something like that... you're something else.

1000638120.english: There are Talon Feather and Hirume in Orca. Shall I introduce them?
1000638120.korean: 오르카에 탈론 페더랑 히루메라고 있는데, 소개 해줄까?

1000638122.english: I think that could be the case. If a complete stranger sits you down and asks a question like that...
1000638122.korean: 그럴 수도 있을 것 같아. 생판 처음 보는 남자가 자길 앉혀놓고 그런 질문을 하고 있으면...

1000638123.english: Come to think of it, P-22 Harpyia, you're secretly...

1000638124.english: I told you to stop reading so many romance novels.
1000638124.korean: 그러게 로맨스 소설 좀 적당히 보랬지.

1000638127.english: Yeah. I do like all books, though.

1000638130.english: Then I'll tell you something good.

1000638131.english: Hey, we should be talking about music!

1000638132.english: Wait a minute. There aren't many people who like books, so I'm glad to meet you.
1000638132.korean: 잠깐만. 책 좋아하는 사람은 별로 없으니까 반갑단 말이야.

1000638133.english: We can connect to our database with this, you know?
1000638133.korean: 이거로 우리 데이터베이스에 접속할 수 있거든?

1000638135.english: It's not quite as good as a paper book, but there are so many types— huh?

1000638138.english: What? You've already received so many? How many books is this in total?
1000638138.korean: 뭐야, 벌써 많이 받아놨네? 이게 다 몇권이야.

1000638143.english: ...Let's talk about music. Is that okay?

1000638145.english: According to the producer's plan, two songs in total—one per unit—plus one group song that we created ourselves.
1000638145.korean: 프로듀서 계획으로는 유닛당 한 곡씩 두 곡에 우리끼리 만들었던 단체곡 하나.

1000638146.english: Plus, there is one new group song that you, Muse, will compose, so there are a total of four songs for the performance.
1000638146.korean: 거기에 뮤즈 네가 새로 작곡할 단체곡 하나 해서 공연곡은 총 네 곡이야.

1000638147.english: We are working on the unit song... but we'd still like you to take a look. Sorry.
1000638147.korean: 유닛 곡은 우리가 만들고 있긴 한데... 그래도 한 번 봐줬으면 좋겠어. 미안.

1000638149.english: And I'm going to have to fix the first song too. The vocals and accompaniment are good, but the mixing and mastering are a mess.
1000638149.korean: 그리고 첫 번째 곡도 고쳐야 할 거야. 보컬하고 반주도 반준데, 믹싱하고 마스터링이 엉망이거든.

1000638151.english: For the part distribution of the fourth song... should I do it the same way as the first song...? I'll figure it out as I work on it...
1000638151.korean: 네 번째 곡 파트 분배는... 첫 번째 곡이랑 똑같이 하면 될까요...? 작업하면서 파악해 볼게요...

1000638152.english: Huh? Of course it has to be different. Then you wouldn't have a part.
1000638152.korean: 응? 당연히 달라야지. 그러면 네 파트가 없잖아.

1000638155.english: The producer said you would be on stage with us too...
1000638155.korean: 프로듀서가 너도 우리랑 같이 무대에 설 거랬는데...

1000638161.english: < Project ORCA, Starry Night Stage > Continued in Part 2.

1000638162.english: Absolutely, absolutely, absolutely, it will be. Love, love, love, you—

1000638165.english: Drink this and rest a bit before you do it. You'll hurt your throat.
1000638165.korean: 이거 마시고 조금 쉬었다가 해. 목 다치겠다.

1000638167.english: That is the highest part, though...

1000638168.english: If it's too high, should I lower the pitch a bit?

1000638171.english: ...Why are you suddenly trying to set the mood?

1000638173.english: Doesn't your voice sound a little different when you sing?
1000638173.korean: 노래할때 목소리 좀 달라지는 것 같지 않아?

1000638178.english: Hehe~ How much I want to make a good impression on the producer-
1000638178.korean: 후후~ 얼마나 프로듀서한테 잘 보이고 싶-

1000638181.english: ......By the way, does my voice sound weird?

1000638182.english: No, it sounds good. And you sing well, too.

1000638183.english: I looked it up, and they said it’s not strange since the breathing changes when you speak.
1000638183.korean: 찾아봤는데, 말할 때랑은 호흡이 달라지니까 이상한 일도 아니래.

1000638184.english: R-really? Then that's a relief- Kyaaak?!

1000638186.english: ...Producer, how long have you been here?

1000638188.english: Hehe, did you come to take a look?

1000638191.english: Would you like to listen to P-29 Lindwurm's rap too?

1000638192.english: Let's let you hear it once the work is a bit more advanced. That way, it will be better for the evaluation.
1000638192.korean: 좀 더 작업이 진행되면 들려드리자. 그래야 평가받기도 더 좋잖아.

1000638193.english: Is that okay, Producer? We are currently...

1000638194.english: The draft of the song and lyrics is ready, so I'm currently practicing hard.
1000638194.korean: 곡이랑 가사 초안이 나와서 한창 연습중이에요.

1000638197.english: N-no, it still needs more adjustments. Give it here.

1000638198.english: Hmm... The lyricist refused, so I guess it can't be helped. I'm sorry.
1000638198.korean: 으음... 작사가가 거부해서 어쩔 수 없네요. 죄송해요.

1000638199.english: How are the other preparations going? Is it okay for us to be the only ones worrying like this?
1000638199.korean: 다른 준비는 어떻게 돼 가? 이렇게 우리들만 신경 쓰고 있어도 돼?

1000638200.english: - Although I coordinate various things, it is actually the other members who help, so I am not that busy yet.
1000638200.korean: - 내가 이것저것 조율하긴 하지만, 실제로 도와주는 건 다른 여러 대원들이니까, 아직까지는 그렇게 눈코 뜰 새 없이 바쁘지는 않다.

1000638201.english: Me! I'll go first, P-29 Lindwurm!

1000638202.english: We just need to practice as usual, right?
1000638202.korean: 저희는 그냥 평소대로 연습하고 있으면 되는 거죠?

1000638203.english: P-29 Lindwurm is cute 24/7, so it's okay to come anytime~

1000638204.english: Ah, but it's a bit embarrassing that you come while I'm sleeping...
1000638204.korean: 아, 그래도 잘 때 오시는 건 좀 부끄러운데에...

1000638205.english: Are you going to practice even while sleeping? You don't usually do that anyway.

1000638206.english: Well, anyway, it’s good. Our schedules don’t always align, so it’s nice to have someone to help us practice.
1000638206.korean: 뭐, 어쨌든 좋네. 우리끼리도 항상 시간이 맞는 건 아니니까, 연습 봐주는 사람 있으면 좋지.

1000638207.english: Yeah. We just happened to need someone else to keep an eye on P-29 Lindwurm.
1000638207.korean: 응. 마침 린티를 감시할 사람이 더 필요한 참이었어.

1000638208.english: Why, P-29 Lindwurm? She's practicing so hard.

1000638209.english: If that is what practicing hard means, I’ll end up switching careers completely to become an idol.
1000638209.korean: 그게 열심히 연습하는거면 나는 이러다 완전히 아이돌로 전업하겠다.

1000638212.english: We can just do it for real once the war is over.

1000638213.english: Ah... just imagining it makes me happy...

1000638215.english: - While working, I suddenly looked up to check the time.
1000638215.korean: - 업무를 보다 문득 고개를 들어 시간을 확인했다.

1000638216.english: - I was supposed to conduct individual training… Who should I go to?
1000638216.korean: - 개별 트레이닝을 진행하기로 했었지... 누구한테 갈까?

1000638217.english: - I made up my mind and got up from my seat.

1000638219.english: Before heading to the practice room, I stopped by the Sky Knights' room just in case, and P/A-8 Blackhound happened to be there.
1000638219.korean: - 연습실에 가기 전에 혹시나 해서 스카이나이츠의 방에 들렀더니, 마침 블랙 하운드가 있었다.

1000638221.english: P/A-8 Blackhound, who greeted me with a shy smile as usual, looked a little tired.
1000638221.korean: - 평소처럼 배시시 웃으며 나를 맞아주는 블랙 하운드는 조금 피곤해보였다.

1000638223.english: P/A-8 Blackhound sat up, rubbed its eyes, and turned the panel to show.
1000638223.korean: - 몸을 일으키고 눈을 비빈 블랙 하운드가 패널을 돌려 보여주었다.

1000638224.english: No. Even if we receive help, I think it is only meaningful if we do it ourselves.
1000638224.korean: 아뇨. 도움을 받더라도 저희가 직접 해야 의미가 있는 일이라고 생각해요.

1000638227.english: P/A-8 Blackhound, smiling brightly at me, cleared its throat.
1000638227.korean: - 나를 보고 방긋 웃어보인 블랙 하운드는 목을 가다듬었다.

1000638228.english: The second is to naturally brush the dust off your collar.
1000638228.korean: 두번째는 자연스럽게, 옷깃 위에 먼지를 털기~

1000638229.english: P/A-8 Blackhound playfully sang a verse and tapped my collar just as the lyrics said.
1000638229.korean: - 장난스레 한 소절을 부른 블랙 하운드는 가사대로 내 옷깃을 톡톡 두드렸다.

1000638231.english: - P/A-8 Blackhound's cute vocals were not only pleasant to listen to, but also suited the song well.
1000638231.korean: - 블랙 하운드의 귀여운 보컬은 듣기도 좋을 뿐더러, 노래에도 잘 어울렸다.

1000638233.english: P/A-8 Blackhound smiled faintly, hesitated for a moment, and then slowly snuggled into me.
1000638233.korean: - 작게 웃은 블랙 하운드는 잠시 망설이더니, 천천히 내게 안겨들었다.

1000638234.english: - A deep, weary sigh tickled my chest.
1000638234.korean: - 피로가 느껴지는 깊은 한숨이 가슴팍을 간질였다.

1000638236.english: Ah, shall I let you hear what I've been working on? I've made quite a bit of progress.
1000638236.korean: 아, 작업한 거 들려드릴까요? 꽤 진전이 있었어요.

1000638237.english: The P/A-8 Blackhound that slipped out of my arms held out an earphone.
1000638237.korean: - 내 품에서 빠져나온 블랙 하운드가 이어폰을 내밀었다.

1000638238.english: As soon as I confirmed that I had earphones in both ears, P/A-8 Blackhound operated the panel.
1000638238.korean: - 내가 양쪽 귀에 이어폰을 꽂은 것을 확인하자, 블랙 하운드가 패널을 조작했다.

1000638239.english: - The MR, which was just over 3 minutes long, ended, and I took out my earphones.

1000638241.english: Perhaps unable to overcome his fatigue, the P/A-8 Blackhound was asleep.
1000638241.korean: - 피로를 이기지 못했는지, 블랙 하운드는 잠들어 있었다.

1000638242.english: - I gently laid her down, covered her with a blanket, and left the room.
1000638242.korean: - 조심스레 편안히 눕히고, 이불을 덮어준 뒤 방을 뒤로했다.

1000638244.english: Due to his caring nature, P/A-8 Blackhound always looks out for the other members during combat.
1000638244.korean: - 챙겨주길 좋아하는 성격 때문에, 블랙 하운드는 전투시엔 항상 다른 대원들에게 신경을 써준다.

1000638245.english: - However, when working on an unfamiliar project like this and taking on difficult tasks yourself, you must be paying much more attention.
1000638245.korean: - 그런데 이런 익숙치 않은 프로젝트를 진행하고, 스스로 힘든 업무를 맡은 상황에서는 훨씬 더 많이 신경쓰고 있겠지.

1000638247.english: P/A-8 Blackhound's eyes, peeking out from their chest, narrowed slightly.
1000638247.korean: - 가슴팍에서 쏙 내민 블랙 하운드의 두 눈이 가늘게 휘어졌다.

1000638248.english: Everyone enjoys it when there's an event like this.

1000638249.english: I like it, you know? I hope it keeps being like this…

1000638250.english: I wish only happy things like this would happen. With my friends, the producer—no…
1000638250.korean: 이렇게 즐거운 일만 있었으면 좋겠어요. 친구들이랑, 프로듀서- 아니...

1000638253.english: Having gathered some energy, P/A-8 Blackhound stretched out after slipping from my arms.
1000638253.korean: - 기운을 차렸는지 내 품에서 빠져나온 블랙 하운드가 쭈욱 기지개를 켰다.

1000638254.english: Ah, Producer. Since you're here, could you listen to the chorus melody? There's been quite some progress, and I'd like your thoughts.
1000638254.korean: 아, 프로듀서. 오신김에 후렴구 멜로디좀 들어주시겠어요? 진전이 꽤 있었는데, 감상을 들어보고 싶어요.

1000638255.english: It's fine. I need the perspective of someone without prior knowledge.
1000638255.korean: 괜찮아요. 지식이 없는 사람의 감상이 필요한 거니까요.

1000638256.english: With a subtle feeling, I took the earphone P/A-8 Blackhound handed me.
1000638256.korean: - 미묘한 기분으로 블랙 하운드가 건넨 이어폰 한 쪽을 받았다.

1000638258.english: P/A-8 Blackhound, wearing the other earphone, clung to me, linking arms, and closed their eyes as they spoke.
1000638258.korean: - 다른 한쪽을 귀에 꽂은 블랙 하운드는 그렇게 말하며 내게 달라붙어 팔짱을 끼곤 눈을 감았다.

1000638259.english: Soon, an upbeat and fresh MR played, and P/A-8 Blackhound, resting their head on my shoulder, began to breathe evenly.
1000638259.korean: - 신나고 상큼한 분위기의 MR이 흘러나오고 얼마 지나지 않아, 내 어깨에 머리를 기댄 블랙 하운드는 고른 숨소리를 내기 시작했다.

1000638260.english: I carefully brushed back P/A-8 Blackhound's falling bangs and decided to rest my eyes briefly as well.
1000638260.korean: - 흘러내린 블랙 하운드의 앞머리를 조심스럽게 넘겨주고, 나도 잠시 눈을 붙이기로 했다.

1000638261.english: - I steadied myself and got up from my seat.

1000638263.english: - As soon as I entered the Sky Knights' room, I spotted the target sprawled on the bed closest to the door.
1000638263.korean: - 스카이나이츠의 방에 들어서자마자, 문에 가장 가까이 있는 침대에 널브러져있는 목표물을 발견했다.

1000638265.english: It's afternoon listening time right now~

1000638266.english: Without needing to ask what that meant, P-29 Lindwurm had her eyes fixed on a hand mirror, making all sorts of expressions.
1000638266.korean: - 그게 뭐냐고 물을 필요도 없이, 린티는 손거울에 시선을 고정하고 온갖 표정을 지어보고 있었다.

1000638268.english: No? It's afternoon makeup time right now.

1000638269.english: After dinner, it'll be evening listening time.

1000638270.english: Somehow, I began to understand P/A-00 Griffon's feelings…

1000638271.english: - While glancing around with a troubled heart, I noticed papers scattered by the pillow.
1000638271.korean: - 심란한 마음으로 주위를 둘러보다 베개맡에 흩어져 있는 종이를 발견했다.

1000638272.english: Yes. I colored in P-29 Lindwurm's part~

1000638273.english: - At the back, is this a rap? By the way, what's the foreign language at the very front?
1000638273.korean: - 뒷쪽에 이게 랩인가? 그나저나 제일 앞에 외국어는 뭐지?

1000638274.english: That's the intro. Want to listen to it?

1000638277.english: How is it? P-29 Lindwurm's doing well, right?

1000638278.english: Heh, right? Ah, P-29 Lindwurm is really the best…
1000638278.korean: 헤헹, 그렇죠? 아아, 린티는 정말 최고야...

1000638279.english: I've practiced both the rap and the song~ so Producer doesn't have to worry~
1000638279.korean: 랩이랑 노래도 다~ 연습해놨으니까, 프로듀서는 걱정 안하셔도 돼요~

1000638280.english: Come on, come over. Producer, you'll enjoy watching the cute P-29 Lindwurm too!
1000638280.korean: 자, 이리 오세요. 프로듀서도 같이 귀~여운 린티를 감상하는 거예요!

1000638281.english: At a loss for words, I spent the rest of the afternoon goofing around with P-29 Lindwurm until evening.
1000638281.korean: - 할 말이 없어진 나는 린티와 함께 뒹굴거리며 저녁 때까지 시간을 때웠다.

1000638283.english: - Of course, I don't know foreign languages either, but compared to the foreign language in the database songs…
1000638283.korean: - 물론 나도 외국어는 할 줄 모르지만, 데이터베이스에 있는 노래에 나오는 외국어랑 비교하면 분명...

1000638284.english: Ah, ahaha… N-no way. Surely, P-29 Lindwurm—
1000638284.korean: 아, 아하하... 그, 그럴리 없어요. 분명 린티는-

1000638285.english: - I operated the panel to play the foreign-language song I had heard.
1000638285.korean: - 패널을 조작해 내가 들었던 외국어 노래를 틀었다.

1000638286.english: As soon as the first line played, P-29 Lindwurm's face turned pale.
1000638286.korean: - 첫 소절이 흘러나오자마자, 린티의 얼굴이 창백해졌다.

1000638288.english: …I'll practice. I can just do it. Tch.

1000638289.english: While the song played, P-29 Lindwurm, who had been showing a variety of expressions earlier, completely sulked as soon as it ended.
1000638289.korean: - 노래가 흘러나오는동안 아까 봤던 것 외에도 다종다양한 표정을 보여주던 린티는, 노래가 끝나자 완전히 토라져버렸다.

1000638290.english: Did you know? P-29 Lindwurm can handle this after just a very short practice.
1000638290.korean: 그거 아세요? 린티는요, 이정도는 아주 잠~깐만 연습하면 할 수 있다구요.

1000638291.english: Then, could you leave now? P-29 Lindwurm needs to p-r-a-c-t-i-c-e.
1000638291.korean: 그럼 이제 가주시겠어요? 린티는 연.습. 해야 되니까요.

1000638292.english: I couldn't help but chuckle at P-29 Lindwurm, who was pouting and rifling through the sheet with the lyrics.
1000638292.korean: - 입을 쭈욱 내밀고 괜시리 가사가 적힌 종이를 뒤적이는 린티의 모습에 쓴웃음이 나왔다.

1000638293.english: To cheer P-29 Lindwurm up… this method would probably be the best.

1000638299.english: - The moment she realized her face had been caught, P-29 Lindwurm's face suddenly came very close.
1000638299.korean: - 얼굴이 붙잡혔다는 걸 깨닫는 순간, 린티의 얼굴이 확 가까워졌다.

1000638300.english: - Before the faint scent of tint left her lips, P-29 Lindwurm, her face bright red, opened her mouth to speak.
1000638300.korean: - 입술에 남은 옅은 틴트의 향이 사라지기도 전에 얼굴이 새빨개진 린티가 입을 열었다.

1000638301.english: - It's because of the producer. When you keep talking like that, it makes my heart feel all tingly...
1000638301.korean: 프로듀서 때문이에요. 자꾸 그렇게 말씀하시니까, 가슴 속이 간질간질해서...

1000638302.english: - Hngh... P-29 Lindwurm's idol career is over now... To think she kissed the producer...
1000638302.korean: 흐윽... 린티는 이제 아이돌 생명 끝났어요... 프로듀서랑 키스를 해버리다니...

1000638303.english: ...Hehe, at this point, there's no helping it... The only choice is to cross the line with the producer...
1000638303.korean: ...후후, 이렇게 된 이상 어쩔 수 없겠네요... 프로듀서와 함께 선을 넘어버리는 수밖에...

1000638305.english: - As she stroked my thigh and got a gentle flick on the forehead, P-29 Lindwurm stuck out her tongue.
1000638305.korean: - 내 허벅지를 쓰다듬다 이마에 살짝 꿀밤을 맞은 린티가 혀를 쏙 내밀었다.

1000638306.english: Still... would you mind watching me practice?
1000638306.korean: 그래도 연습하는 거, 봐주시면 안 돼요?

1000638307.english: - When I dropped to the floor with a thud, I found myself face-to-face with P-29 Lindwurm, who was lying on the bed.
1000638307.korean: - 바닥에 털썩 주저앉자 침대에 엎드린 린티와 정면으로 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000638308.english: - Resting her chin in her hand, P-29 Lindwurm stared at my face for a while before carefully opening her mouth.
1000638308.korean: - 턱을 괴고 한동안 내 얼굴을 바라보던 린티가 조심스럽게 입을 열었다.

1000638310.english: Please look forward to our performance.

1000638312.english: - After that, P-29 Lindwurm continued to silently smile at me for a while.
1000638312.korean: - 그 후로도 린티는 한동안 말없이 방긋방긋 웃으며 나를 바라봤다.

1000638313.english: - Normally, I would've thought she was just trying to cut down on practice time, but somehow, this time, I didn't feel that way.
1000638313.korean: - 평소라면 연습 시간을 줄이려는 꾀라고 생각했겠지만, 어쩐지 이번에는 그런 생각이 들지 않았다.

1000638314.english: - Just as I made up my mind and was about to stand, the door to the captain's office opened.
1000638314.korean: - 마음을 정하고 자리에서 일어나려는 찰나, 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000638315.english: Commander, do you have a moment?

1000638316.english: I wanted to talk briefly about the costumes.
1000638316.korean: 의상 관련해서 잠깐 이야기할 게 있어서요.

1000638319.english: - The conversation went on longer than expected, and before I knew it, evening had passed, and it was nearly lights-out.
1000638319.korean: - 생각보다 이야기가 길어져서, 어느새 저녁시간도 훌쩍 지나 취침시간에 가까워지고 말았다.

1000638320.english: - It wasn't like we had made a promise, but… I couldn't shake the thought.
1000638320.korean: - 약속을 잡은 건 아니지만, 마음에 걸리는걸...

1000638322.english: - On the way to the Sky Knights' dorm, the lights in the hallway turned off as curfew began.
1000638322.korean: - 스카이나이츠의 숙소로 향하는 도중 소등 시간이 되어 복도의 조명이 꺼졌다.

1000638323.english: - Seeing a faint light leaking from a door at the end of the hall, I made my way there.
1000638323.korean: - 문틈 사이로 새어나오는 불빛을 보고 복도 끝으로 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000638325.english: Singing while dancing really isn't a joke...
1000638325.korean: 안무하면서 노래 부르는 건 진짜 장난 아니네...

1000638327.english: What if I miss the high notes on stage...

1000638328.english: Sigh. I guess I'll just practice mo— Kyaa?!

1000638329.english: - Startled by P/A-00 Griffon's scream as our eyes met through the crack in the door, I ended up yelling too.
1000638329.korean: - 문 틈 사이로 눈이 마주친 그리폰의 비명 소리에 놀라 나도 소리를 지르고 말았다.

1000638332.english: Really? Oh, that individual training thing?

1000638334.english: - I explained to P/A-00 Griffon, who was giving me a suspicious look, the conversation I had with Audrey Dreamweaver about the costumes.
1000638334.korean: - 의심의 눈초리를 보내는 그리폰에게 오드리와 의상에 대해 나눈 이야기를 들려주었다.

1000638336.english: Since we've decided to do this, we might as well do it right.
1000638336.korean: 이왕 하기로 한 거, 제대로 해야지.

1000638337.english: - Watching P/A-00 Griffon mumble, "Can't be the one to drag us down...," I couldn't help but smile.
1000638337.korean: - 발목을 잡을 수는 없으니까... 하고 중얼거리는 그리폰의 모습에 나도 모르게 웃음이 나왔다.

1000638338.english: What? Got a problem? Why are you smiling like that.

1000638339.english: Since you're here, watch the choreography and give me some feedback. I still need to fix a few things.
1000638339.korean: 온 김에 안무 보고 평가좀 해줘. 아직 좀 더 고쳐야 돼.

1000638340.english: - P/A-00 Griffon turned down the volume and stood in the center of the practice room.
1000638340.korean: - 그리폰은 볼륨을 낮춰 음악을 튼 뒤, 연습실 중앙에 섰다.

1000638341.english: - As soon as the intro ended and I started the first move...
1000638341.korean: - 전주가 끝나고, 첫 번째 동작을 하는 순간...

1000638343.english: - P/A-00 Griffon staggered and collapsed to the floor.

1000638345.english: Ah, yeah. It's nothing. I think I just twisted my ankle a bit.
1000638345.korean: 아, 응. 별 거 아냐. 발목을 좀 접질렸나봐.

1000638346.english: I'm not used to heels yet. I always wore combat boots...
1000638346.korean: 아직 구두가 익숙하질 않아서. 맨날 워커만 신었으니까...

1000638347.english: - I carefully gripped the Griffon’s collapsed leg and examined its ankle.
1000638347.korean: - 주저앉은 그리폰의 다리를 조심스럽게 붙잡고 발목을 살펴보았다.

1000638348.english: - The joint area was beginning to swell.

1000638349.english: You think I'm some kind of civilian-use Bioroid or something?

1000638350.english: This isn't even an injury, so don't worry about it.
1000638350.korean: 이정도는 부상도 아니니까 신경 쓰지 마.

1000638351.english: - Despite saying that, P/A-00 Griffon's brows furrowed in pain as she stood.
1000638351.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 일어서는 그리폰의 미간은 고통으로 찌푸려져 있었다.

1000638352.english: It's okay. I can walk on my own.

1000638353.english: Even after that, I offered to help him several times, but P/A-00 Griffon eventually limped back to his quarters.
1000638353.korean: - 그 뒤로도 몇 번이고 부축해주겠다고 말했지만, 그리폰은 끝끝내 숙소까지 절뚝이며 돌아갔다.

1000638355.english: - He put his arms under his body and lifted the P/A-00 Griffon in the so-called princess carry position.
1000638355.korean: - 몸 아래로 팔을 넣어 소위 공주님 안기 자세로 그리폰을 안아들었다.

1000638356.english: P/A-00 Griffon, having been dazed for a moment, soon began to struggle.
1000638356.korean: - 잠시 멍하니 있던 그리폰은 이내 발버둥을 치기 시작했다.

1000638357.english: Oh, if you're going to carry me, just give me a piggyback ride! Why are you acting so shy!
1000638357.korean: 오, 옮겨줄거면 업으면 되잖아! 왜 이렇게 부끄러운 식으로 하는데!

1000638358.english: - The corridors of the Orca are a place where you can meet crew members wherever you go during the day, but at night, they exude an eerie atmosphere.
1000638358.korean: - 낮에는 어딜가든 대원들을 만날 수 있는 오르카 호의 복도지만, 밤이 되면 을씨년스러움을 풍긴다.

1000638360.english: Whether it had run out of strength or given up, P/A-00 Griffon stopped struggling and carefully wrapped its arms around my neck.
1000638360.korean: - 힘이 빠진건지, 포기한건지. 발버둥을 멈춘 그리폰은 조심스럽게 내 목에 팔을 둘렀다.

1000638364.english: - For a while, only the sound of my footsteps echoed in the hallway.

1000638365.english: When they were about halfway to the Sky Knights' room, P/A-00 Griffon brought up a random topic.
1000638365.korean: - 스카이나이츠의 방까지 반 정도 왔을까, 그리폰은 뜬금없는 말을 꺼냈다.

1000638366.english: ...Please stop by the restaurant before going to the room.

1000638367.english: - We are currently on the complete opposite side of the restaurant, and it takes nearly 10 minutes to walk there.
1000638367.korean: - 지금 우리가 있는 곳은 식당의 완전 반대편으로, 걸어서 가면 10분 가까이 걸린다.

1000638368.english: I'm thirsty from practicing hard. I want to drink some water.
1000638368.korean: 열심히 연습했더니 목 말라서. 물 마실래.

1000638370.english: Profit...! What are you talking about!

1000638371.english: - Bickering sometimes, and having serious conversations at other times.
1000638371.korean: - 티격대기도 하고, 진지한 이야기를 하기도 하면서.

1000638372.english: - By the time we arrived at the Sky Knights' lodgings after passing through the restaurant, it was already well past midnight.
1000638372.korean: - 식당을 거쳐 스카이나이츠의 숙소에 도착했을 때는 이미 자정이 훌쩍 지나 있었다.

1000638374.english: Yeah. And we're adding one more group song.

1000638375.english: Of course. I'd actually prefer that.

1000638376.english: Hmm... yeah, I think that could work.

1000638379.english: W-Well still... wouldn't the three of them look cool as a band?
1000638379.korean: 무, 뭐 그래도... 저 셋이서 밴드하면 멋있지 않을까?

1000638382.english: I guess I can't get in the way of that...

1000638383.english: I'll figure something out. I'll check in often.

1000638384.english: Then go ahead with the meeting. I'll come back later.

1000638385.english: She's pretty. Do you like her?

1000638386.english: I'll call P-49 Sleipnir as soon as we receive hers, too.

1000638388.english: Oh, is it okay now that you've debuted?

1000638389.english: I've never seen P-49 Sleipnir this serious before.

1000638390.english: Then doesn't it mean it doesn't have to be as an idol?
1000638390.korean: 그러면 꼭 아이돌이 아니라도 괜찮지 않아?

1000638391.english: Honestly, I started seeing her differently too...

1000638392.english: P-49 Sleipnir is a good leader. Passionate and capable.
1000638392.korean: 슬레이프니르는 좋은 리더야. 열정적이고, 능력도 있지.

1000638393.english: So try looking around a bit more and figure out what the others want.
1000638393.korean: 그러니까 조금만 더 주위를 둘러보고, 다른 대원들이 바라는 걸 파악해봐.

1000638395.english: Mm. I'll call when I meet Muse.

1000638396.english: Well... I said that as a Commander.

1000638399.english: Hmm? Sorry, I didn't quite catch that.

1000638402.english: Is it okay if we talk from a distance?

1000638405.english: What's your physical age? The data says 23.

1000638406.english: You're from Amuse Attendant... and since you've just been restored, you probably don't have any composing experience yet, right?
1000638406.korean: 어뮤즈 어텐던트 소속에... 복원됐으니까 작곡 경험은 아직 없을테고, 그렇지?

1000638407.english: Ah, I see. That's good—wait, what's wrong?

1000638410.english: Well... it can't be helped. You don't have your memories.
1000638410.korean: 그야 뭐... 어쩔 수 없지. 기억이 없는걸.

1000638411.english: Sorry. Got a little off-topic for a second.

1000638412.english: To get to the point, I'd like you to help with composing.

1000638414.english: Yeah, yeah. Got it. Our P-49 Sleipnir really is amazing.
1000638414.korean: 그래그래. 알았어. 우리 슬레이프니르 진짜 대단해.

1000638415.english: But seriously, were there really lines stretching kilometers for her concerts?
1000638415.korean: 그런데, 진짜로 이녀석 콘서트에 줄을 몇 킬로미터 씩이나 섰었어?

1000638418.english: I get that you're eager, but calm down for a sec. Muse, what were you trying to say?
1000638418.korean: 의욕은 알겠는데 잠깐 얌전히 있어봐. 뮤즈, 무슨 말 하려고 했어?

1000638420.english: Then let's do that. Until then, take your time and adjust slowly.

1000638421.english: I think it sounds good too, you know?

1000638424.english: Oh, already? Can I see the lyrics?

1000638425.english: Got it. I'll listen to it later.

1000638427.english: So, I was thinking of doing some individual training.
1000638427.korean: 그래서 말인데, 개별 트레이닝을 좀 해볼까 해.

1000638428.english: We'll decide the order later. No need to schedule anything—I'll just be around while you're practicing.
1000638428.korean: 순서는 나중에 정할게. 따로 시간 잡을 필요 없이, 그냥 너희들 연습할 때 같이 있을 거야.

1000638431.english: Should be about time they're back, right?

1000638433.english: Hi. Are you working on the arrangement?

1000638434.english: You're working hard. Should we ask Muse to help out a bit more?
1000638434.korean: 고생이 많네. 뮤즈한테 좀 더 도와달라고 할까?

1000638435.english: You don't need to practice singing?

1000638438.english: Just hang in there a bit longer.

1000638442.english: Lately, it feels like it's all been about events...
1000638442.korean: 요새는 너무 행사만 한 것 같지만 말야...

1000638444.english: I don't really know much about music either...

1000638460.english: Reflecting on yourself is always painful...

1000638461.english: P-29 Lindwurm's cute, so even with just a bit of practice, she'll look great.
1000638461.korean: 린티는 귀여우니까, 조금만 연습해도 예쁘게 보일거야.

1000638462.english: I'm looking forward to seeing cute P-29 Lindwurm on stage too.
1000638462.korean: 나도 귀여운 린티의 무대를 기대하고 있고.

1000638464.english: Haha, how's that? Feeling more motivated to pract—mmph?!
1000638464.korean: 하하, 어때. 이제 연습할 의욕이- 읍?!

1000638467.english: Yeah. I came here for that anyway.

1000638469.english: I'm really looking forward to it. A lot.

1000638471.english: Hmm... it should be fine. What is it?

1000638475.english: I saw the light was on, so I stopped by.

1000638476.english: Yeah. I was on my way to the dorms just in case.
1000638476.korean: 응. 혹시나 해서 숙소로 가던 중이었어.

1000638477.english: I was planning to come earlier, but...

1000638478.english: Even for me, but P/A-00 Griffon's practicing this late too?
1000638478.korean: 나도 난데, 그리폰도 이렇게 늦게까지 연습하는 거야?

1000638486.english: I told you to stay still.

1000638488.english: I could lift you with one arm, you know?

1000638491.english: ...Now that I think about it, you're pretty heavy. I'll go slowly.

1000638495.english: ...You're working hard looking out for the other members, huh?

1000638496.english: Guess I should go to P-29 Lindwurm.

1000638497.english: Love, love, love~ You are to me~

1000638498.english: Why are you hitting on someone you just met like that?
1000638498.korean: 처음 보는 애한테 그렇게 막 들이대면 어떡해?

1000638499.english: Should I go check on P/A-00 Griffon?

1000638502.english: I'm pretty good at my job, so I guess the exclusive fee is pretty expensive~? I wonder if the customer can afford it~&nHmm... Okay. Since you seem quite capable, I'll explain first. Don't be surprised, right?&n... ...I'll tell you I love you a hundred times a day, for the rest of my life, Big Brother♥&n
1000638502.korean: 저, 이래 봬도 제 분야에서는 뛰어난 편이라 전속은 꽤 비싸다구요~? 손님이 지불하실 수 있으려나아~&n흐음… 좋아요. 손님은 꽤 능력 있으신 것 같으니까 일단 말씀은 드릴게요. 놀라시면 안돼요?&n…...평생 동안, 하루에 백 번씩 좋아한다고 해주는 거야, 오빠♥

1000638504.english: You're in serious trouble. Are you sure the choreography will be okay?

1000638505.english: Linti thought it over carefully, and wondered if it would be better for Harpe to just stand still as the main vocalist?
1000638505.korean: 린티가 곰곰이 생각해봤는데, 하르페는 그냥 메인보컬로 가만히 서있는게 낫지 않을까?

1000638507.english: I think the problem is that you're too stiff... Try doing some stretching.
1000638507.korean: 너무 뻣뻣한게 문제같은데... 스트레칭이라도 좀 해봐.

1000638508.english: Just let your body move to the beat like P-29 Lindwurm!

1000638509.english: Uh, I'll figure it out somehow.

1000638510.english: ...Just in case you're wondering, reading books probably won't make you more flexible.
1000638510.korean: ...혹시나 해서 말하는데, 책 읽는다고 유연해지진 않을걸?

1000638512.english: Everyone, go wash up! The shower room is empty.

1000638516.english: ...Can't you teach me the knack for dancing...?

1000638517.english: You must have been desperate enough to seek guidance from the former commander...

1000638518.english: I could tell you anytime! You should have told me sooner.
1000638518.korean: 그거야 얼마든지 알려줄 수 있지! 진작 말하지 그랬어.

1000638519.english: Alright, let's go to the practice room!

1000638521.english: Didn't the squadron commander wash up? And we have a sortie coming up in a little while.
1000638521.korean: 전대장은 씻고 온 거 아니었어? 그리고 조금 이따 우리 출격 있잖아.

1000638522.english: There are still two hours left! That's enough, enough. Come on, hurry!

1000638526.english: saw P-22 Harpyia being dragged away by the squad leader. What happened?
1000638526.korean: 하르페가 전대장한테 끌려가던데, 무슨 일 있었어?

1000638527.english: They asked me to teach them how to dance.

1000638528.english: You've completely let go of your pride...

1000638529.english: Yeah... I'll have to comfort you later.

1000638530.english: P/A-00 Griffon, go wash up too. The shower room is empty.

1000638536.english: Looks like you've calmed down a bit now?

1000638537.english: I've been in a panic for the past few days.

1000638539.english: I'll apologize on behalf of our squad leader.

1000638540.english: No matter how much I tried to stop her, she wouldn't listen.

1000638542.english: Thanks to Mr. P-49 Sleipnir constantly visiting and cheering me on, uh...
1000638542.korean: 슬레이프니르 씨가 계속 찾아와서 응원해주신 덕분에, 그...

1000638543.english: ...I was able to muster up courage again.

1000638545.english: Well, actually, she just kept knocking on the door and shouting that we should be idols together...
1000638545.korean: 사, 사실은 문을 두들기면서 같이 아이돌하자고 외치시기만 했지만요...

1000638547.english: But, still... that alone gave me a lot of energy.
1000638547.korean: 그, 그래도... 그것만으로도 엄청 기운이 났어요.

1000638549.english: But seeing what you brought, did you make a new song or something?
1000638549.korean: 근데 그거 들고온 거 보니까 노래 새로 만들기라도 했어?

1000638552.english: Hmm... but the squad leader and P-22 Harpyia are out right now, and we have to go out on reconnaissance soon, so let's listen to it later.
1000638552.korean: 음... 근데 지금 전대장이랑 하르페가 부재중에, 곧 정찰 나가야되니까 이따가 듣자.

1000638553.english: I need to go wash up too. P-29 Lindwurm! Let's go wash up.
1000638553.korean: 나도 씻고 와야 되고. 린티! 씻으러 가자.

1000638554.english: Ah... um, then I'll be back in a little while...
1000638554.korean: 아... 그, 그럼 전 조금 이따 다시...

1000638556.english: It is okay to be comfortable.

1000638557.english: Here, let's have a cup of tea.

1000638559.english: Ah, I want to drink too.

1000638562.english: ...Um, Muse. If you don't mind, could you give us a little advice on our unit song?
1000638562.korean: ...저, 뮤즈 양. 혹시 괜찮으면, 저희 유닛 곡에 조언을 조금 해주실 수 있나요?

1000638563.english: Even after increasing the BPM and breaking down the beats, it still feels sluggish...
1000638563.korean: BPM을 올리고, 박자를 쪼개봐도 영 쳐지는 느낌이라...

1000638564.english: Hmm... I'll have to listen to it to know for sure, but the melody or lyrics might be the problem.
1000638564.korean: 음... 일단 들어봐야 알겠지만, 멜로디나 가사가 문제일 수도 있어요.

1000638565.english: Have you finished writing the lyrics by any chance?

1000638566.english: No, only the melody so far...

1000638567.english: Here, I will play it for you.

1000638568.english: ...Hehe, I'm glad you're on good terms.

1000638571.english: Just hearing the sketch makes me love it!

1000638572.english: Can't you give this to P-29 Lindwurm?

1000638573.english: It's such a stark contrast to what we did...
1000638573.korean: 우리가 한 거랑 너무 비교 되잖아...

1000638574.english: I'm back~ Ugh, my whole body-

1000638575.english: Huh? What was that song just now?

1000638578.english: Muse was here? Where is she now?

1000638579.english: She stepped out to the bathroom. It's a song we'll all sing together.
1000638579.korean: 잠깐 화장실 갔어. 우리 전부 다같이 부를 노래래.

1000638580.english: Eheheh, you finally came out of your room.

1000638581.english: While we wait, let's listen to the song again. Hm? From the top!
1000638581.korean: 기다리면서 노래 다시 들어보자. 응? 처음부터!

1000638582.english: Woooow... it sounds totally different from the beginning...

1000638585.english: That's a relief. Seems like everyone likes it.
1000638585.korean: 다행이네. 다들 마음에 드는 것 같아.

1000638587.english: ......Since we're at it, could you remake our group and unit songs too?
1000638587.korean: ......이왕 하는 거, 우리 단체곡이랑 유닛곡도 네가 다시 만들어주면 안돼?

1000638588.english: Even if we got help, the quality difference is too big...
1000638588.korean: 아무리 도움을 받았어도, 퀄리티가 너무 차이나는 것 같은데...

1000638592.english: We asked Muse if she could fix the songs we made too... that scared me...
1000638592.korean: 뮤즈한테 우리가 만든 곡도 고쳐달라고 했는데... 깜짝이야...

1000638595.english: If I touch it any more... the feelings you all put into the songs will be damaged.
1000638595.korean: 제가 더이상 손을 대면... 곡에 담긴 여러분의 마음이 훼손되어버려요.

1000638597.english: ......Those songs, they're all for the Producer, aren't they?
1000638597.korean: ......그 곡들, 전부 프로듀서님을 위한 곡 인거죠?

1000638599.english: Writing such forward lyrics and then denying it—you're quite shameless.
1000638599.korean: 그렇게 적극적인 가사를 써놓고 부정하다니, 상당한 철면피로군요.

1000638601.english: It's not just the lyrics... I can feel it in the whole song.
1000638601.korean: 꼭 가사뿐만 아니라... 노래 전체에서 느껴져요.

1000638602.english: This is a one-of-a-kind song, meant for only one person in the world.
1000638602.korean: 이건 세상에 둘도 없는, 단 한사람만을 위한 노래예요.

1000638603.english: Others might just think it's an ordinary love song, but the Producer would know the moment they heard it.
1000638603.korean: 다른 분들이 들으면 평범한 사랑 노래라고 느껴질 수도 있겠지만, 프로듀서님만은 듣자마자 아실 수 있겠죠.

1000638606.english: Conveying your true feelings through a song, and the one who hears it responding back...
1000638606.korean: 노래로 진심을 전하고, 그걸 들은 분이 대답해주고...

1000638610.english: You finally came out! I was really worried, you know!

1000638611.english: And to think you even made us a song like this...!

1000638612.english: Muse, you're now an honorary Sky Knights member!

1000638616.english: ...Still, I don't mind this kind of heartwarming development.
1000638616.korean: ...랄까, 이런 가슴이 뜨거워지는 전개, 싫지 않군요.

1000638619.english: The stylist's here... they want you to come to the captain's room?

1000638621.english: I thought you'd be excited, but you're surprisingly unenthusiastic?
1000638621.korean: 엄청 좋아할 줄 알았는데 의외로 심드렁하네?

1000638622.english: Well, my style's already perfected, so there's not much to change.
1000638622.korean: 그야 내 스타일은 이미 완성되어 있어서 별로 손 댈 필요가 없거든.

1000638623.english: I mean... for overall group cohesion and stuff...

1000638624.english: Plus, Muse's hair needs some tidying up, so let's just go.
1000638624.korean: 또 뮤즈는 머리 좀 정리해야 할테니까 일단 가보자.

1000638626.english: Yup. With makeup, hair done, and a proper outfit, you'll totally look like an idol too.
1000638626.korean: 응. 메이크업 하고, 머리도 세팅하고, 의상까지 갖춰 입으면 뮤즈도 분명 아이돌처럼 보일 거야.

1000638628.english: A shy girl who hides her face with bangs transforms—classic trope.
1000638628.korean: 앞머리로 얼굴을 가린 수수녀가 변신하는 전개입니까... 왕도로군요.

1000638629.english: But classics are classics for a reason. The Producer will be smitten.
1000638629.korean: 그렇지만 왕도는 왕도이기에 왕도. 프로듀서는 시험에 빠지게 되겠죠.

1000638631.english: Alright, come on, let's all go!

1000638633.english: Then, I'll shampoo your hair. Here you go.

1000638634.english: The captain's cabin door opened as BoRyeon pushed a chair toward the temporarily installed washbasin.
1000638634.korean: - 임시로 설치한 세면대로 보련이 의자를 밀고 갈 때 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000638636.english: Ah, so you're BoRyeon! Nice to meet you!

1000638637.english: Hello~ I'll just shampoo your hair and then take care of you.
1000638637.korean: 안녕하세요~ 여기 손님 샴푸만 해드리고 봐드릴게요.

1000638638.english: - The world went dark at the same time as I felt something soft, squishy, large, and heavy touch on my forehead.
1000638638.korean: - 이마에 뭔가 부드럽고 말랑말랑하고 커다랗고 묵직한 것이 닿는 느낌과 동시에 세상이 어두워졌다.

1000638640.english: Hehe, are you in a good mood?

1000638641.english: P-Producer...? You're not actually enjoying this, are you...?
1000638641.korean: 프, 프로듀서...? 설마 즐기고 있는 거야...?

1000638642.english: Look at that grinning mouth. She's really having a blast.
1000638642.korean: 저 입 헤실거리고 있는 것 좀 봐. 아주 신나게 즐기고 계시네.

1000638643.english: P-29 Lindwurm could more than do that much for you, too...
1000638643.korean: 린티도 그정도는 충~분히 해드릴 수 있는데...

1000638644.english: I'll rinse it for you now.

1000638645.english: BoRyeon grabbed the back of my neck and lifted me up slightly to wash the back of my head.
1000638645.korean: - 보련이 뒷머리를 씻기기 위해 내 뒷목을 잡고 살짝 들어올렸다.

1000638647.english: Did you call us over just to show us this...?

1000638648.english: The producer... has a taste for catching happiness...?

1000638649.english: Hmm... should we come back a little later?
1000638649.korean: 음... 우리는 조금 이따 다시 오는게 좋을까?

1000638651.english: Fortunately, BoRyeon pulled away from me before the misunderstanding spiraled out of control.
1000638651.korean: - 다행히도 오해가 걷잡을 수 없이 커지기 전에 보련이 내게서 몸을 뗐다.

1000638653.english: BoRyeon washed and dried my hair with quick movements, and even applied a nourishing treatment.
1000638653.korean: - 보련은 재빠른 손놀림으로 내 머리를 감겨주고 말린 뒤, 영양제까지 발라주었다.

1000638654.english: Only then were I able to face the Sky Knights and proceed with BoRyeon's introduction.
1000638654.korean: - 그런 다음에야 스카이나이츠와 마주하고, 보련의 소개를 진행할 수 있었다.

1000638655.english: Hello, my name is BoRyeon. Nice to meet you.

1000638656.english: I looked at my reflection in the mirror while Sky Knights and BoRyeon exchanged greetings.
1000638656.korean: - 스카이나이츠와 보련이 인사를 나누는 동안 거울에 내 모습을 비춰봤다.

1000638657.english: - Certainly... it seems more luxurious than when I just left it to a Battle Maid...
1000638657.korean: - 확실히... 적당히 배틀메이드에게 맡겼던 것보다 고급스러운 것 같기도 하고...

1000638658.english: Hmm... I think you'd be a good match for P-29 Lindwurm's wavelength.
1000638658.korean: 음... 린티랑 파장이 잘 맞을 것 같은 분이신데요?

1000638659.english: Oh. Do you like dressing up too, sir?

1000638660.english: But do you really have to change your hairstyle? I find it comfortable and nice just the way it is.
1000638660.korean: 근데 꼭 머리스타일 바꿔야 돼? 나는 이대로가 편하고 좋은데.

1000638661.english: ...Well, if the producer told me to try it, I’d. Like getting hair extensions for long hair or dyeing it...
1000638661.korean: ...뭐, 프로듀서가 해보라면 해보겠지만. 머리 붙여서 장발이나, 염색이나...

1000638662.english: Hmm... From the way I see it, it seems like you all already have a firmly established style of your own.
1000638662.korean: 으음... 제가보기에, 여러분은 이미 본인만의 스타일이 확고하신 것 같아요.

1000638663.english: Rather than making a big deal out of it, I think it would be better to just help with the maintenance and setup.
1000638663.korean: 굳이 크게 손대는 것보단, 관리랑 세팅 정도만 도와드리는 게 어떨까 싶네요~

1000638664.english: ...You've really gotten more and more sweet-talking lately.

1000638665.english: I like it even if it's just empty words.

1000638666.english: Because it feels like they pay attention to every single little thing...
1000638666.korean: 작은 거라도 하나하나 관심 가져주는 것 같으니까...

1000638667.english: I, I didn't say I didn't like it, you know?

1000638668.english: Hehe, as expected, there are few units that can match our beauty!
1000638668.korean: 헤헹, 역시 미모로는 우리를 따라올 부대가 몇 없지!

1000638672.english: Isn't it super bouncy? I'm bragging about it~

1000638673.english: It is very damaged. You don't take care of it separately, do you?
1000638673.korean: 아주 많이 상해있어요. 따로 관리 안하시죠?

1000638675.english: What do you use to wash your hair?

1000638676.korean: 그, 그냥... 샴푸 있는 거 아무거나...

1000638677.english: You shouldn't do that~ You should use one that fits your hair.
1000638677.korean: 그러면 안 돼요~ 본인 머리카락에 맞는 걸로 쓰셔야죠.

1000638678.english: What about the rinse and treatment? And the nourishing serum?

1000638679.english: Um... I don't really know about that kind of thing...

1000638680.english: I told you, you should have used the one Linti recommended.
1000638680.korean: 그러게 린티가 추천한 거 쓰지 그랬어~

1000638681.english: Do you know how bad it is for your skin and hair to be exposed to the wind all day long?
1000638681.korean: 하루종일 바람 쐬는게 얼마나 피부랑 머리카락에 안 좋은지 알아?

1000638683.english: Come to think of it, didn't it take even a week for me to borrow the P-29 Lindwurm cosmetics and face masks?
1000638683.korean: 그러고보니 린티 화장품이랑 팩 빌려가는 것도 일주일을 안갔었던가?

1000638685.english: Sigh, I'll teach P-29 Lindwurm too.

1000638686.english: Wow, as expected of a professional customer?

1000638688.english: Like a swan on a lake, it takes tremendous effort to maintain this cuteness.
1000638688.korean: 호수 위의 백조처럼, 이 귀여움을 유지하려면 어마어마한 노력이 필요한 법이니까요.

1000638690.english: You have to put up with the hassle and inconvenience to achieve beauty.
1000638690.korean: 귀찮은거랑 번거로운 걸 참아야 아름다움을 쟁취할 수 있다구요~

1000638691.english: ...Uh, then I'll give it a try.

1000638692.english: Okay then, please take this for now.

1000638693.english: P-49 Sleipnir, blushing and stealing furtive glances at me, accepted the numerous beauty products that BoRyeon offered.
1000638693.korean: - 얼굴을 붉히고 나를 흘깃흘깃 훔쳐보던 슬레이프니르는 보련이 내미는 수많은 미용용품을 받아들었다.

1000638694.english: Come over here~ Then, let's start with the basic cleansing routine~
1000638694.korean: 이리로 오시고~ 그럼 기초 세안법부터 시작할게요~

1000638695.english: W-Is there a special way to wash your face too?!

1000638697.english: - We adjusted the schedule to minimize the number of Sky Knights sorties, but even that had its limits.
1000638697.korean: - 일정을 조정해 스카이나이츠의 출격은 최대한 줄여뒀지만, 그것도 한계가 있었다.

1000638698.english: I see. This time, all six members are sortieing.

1000638699.english: Then I guess I should go for now...

1000638700.english: ......P-29 Lindwurm. What should I do to keep my skin from getting damaged by the wind?
1000638700.korean: ......린티. 바람에 피부 안 상하려면 어떻게 해야 돼?

1000638701.english: Well then, Producer, I'll be going now.

1000638702.english: You're welcome. That is exactly what we are supposed to do anyway.

1000638705.english: By any chance... is there a makeup method that can make even someone with my looks look cute...?
1000638705.korean: 혹시... 저 같은 외모도 귀엽게 보일 수 있는 메이크업 방법이 있을까요...?

1000638708.english: After the Sky Knights left the captain's quarters to sortie, they made a request to BoRyeon.
1000638708.korean: - 스카이나이츠가 출격을 위해 함장실을 나선 뒤, 보련에게 한 가지 부탁을 했다.

1000638709.english: Of course~ It's one of my areas of expertise.
1000638709.korean: 그럼요~ 제 전문 분야 중 하나예요.

1000638710.english: Shall I do it for you?

1000638713.english: BoRyeon, who had been looking at me as if to say there were all sorts of fascinating creatures, soon smiled.
1000638713.korean: - 신기한 생물도 다 있다는듯이 나를 바라보던 보련이 이내 미소지었다.

1000638714.english: No, no. I was just thinking that there are customers who say things like that.
1000638714.korean: 아뇨아뇨. 이런 말씀을 하는 손님도 있구나 해서요.

1000638715.english: First, let's start with a massage to loosen up your stiff shoulders.
1000638715.korean: 일단 뭉친 어깨 풀어주는 마사지부터 시작할게요~

1000638716.english: Saying that, BoRyeon turned around and placed her hand on my shoulder.
1000638716.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 뒤로 돌아온 보련이 내 어깨에 손을 올렸다.

1000638718.english: Wow... it's really all clumped together. It's totally rock, rock.
1000638718.korean: 우와... 엄청 뭉쳐있는데요? 완전 돌이네, 돌.

1000638719.english: There was clearly no strength in BoRyeon's hand, yet every time she massaged it gently, excruciating pain pierced through her entire body.
1000638719.korean: - 분명 보련의 손에는 힘이 하나도 들어가있지 않은데, 살살 주무를 때마다 온 몸을 관통하는 격통이 몰아쳤다.

1000638720.english: Gently like this~ use your thumb to loosen up the tight muscles by rotating them.
1000638720.korean: 이렇게 부드럽게~ 엄지 손가락을 이용해서 돌리듯이 뭉친 근육을 풀어주는 거예요.

1000638721.english: Just as I was barely getting used to the pain, a new stimulus began, and just as I was getting used to that again, BoRyeon's hand movements stimulated a different spot, leaving me unable to regain my composure.
1000638721.korean: - 간신히 통증에 익숙해질때쯤 새로운 자극이 시작되고, 또다시 익숙해질때쯤 다른 곳을 자극하는 보련의 손놀림에 정신을 차릴 수가 없었다.

1000638722.english: As I struggled to hold onto my fading consciousness and debated whether to press the emergency call button, BoRyeon's movements suddenly came to a halt.
1000638722.korean: - 아득해지는 정신을 붙잡으며 비상 호출 버튼을 눌러야하나 고민하던 중, 갑자기 보련의 움직임이 뚝 멎었다.

1000638724.english: - Following BoRyeon's gaze toward the captain's quarters door, I ended up making eye contact with Muse through the gap.
1000638724.korean: - 함장실 문 쪽을 바라보는 보련의 시선을 따라가자, 문틈으로 뮤즈와 딱 눈이 마주치고 말았다.

1000638725.english: - Realizing she had been caught, Muse fidgeted nervously for about three seconds before closing her eyes tightly and running away.
1000638725.korean: - 들켰다는 것을 깨닫고 약 3초 동안 안절부절하던 뮤즈는 눈을 질끈 감고 도망쳐 버렸다.

1000638730.english: - The sound of the fierce chase coming from the hallway gradually faded away.
1000638730.korean: - 복도에서 들려오는 치열한 추격전의 소리가 점점 멀어져갔다.

1000638731.english: - I wonder if I'm doing some work for a moment...

1000638732.english: Some time later, BoRyeon returned triumphantly to the captain's quarters after capturing Muse, who was desperately trying to pull her bangs down.
1000638732.korean: - 얼마 후, 필사적으로 앞머리를 내리는 뮤즈를 포획한 보련이 의기양양하게 함장실로 돌아왔다.

1000638734.english: Styling and intensive care are needed from head to toe.
1000638734.korean: 머리부터 발끝까지 스타일링과 집중 관리가 필요해요.

1000638737.english: - I heard just a few days ago that as soon as she found out she’d be going on stage, she locked herself in her room.
1000638737.korean: - 본인도 무대에 올라가게 될 거라는 걸 알게 되자마자 방에 틀어박혔다고 들은게 며칠 전.

1000638738.english: - It looks like things have finally settled down a bit...

1000638740.english: - Muse still avoided my gaze and shook her head almost imperceptibly.
1000638740.korean: - 뮤즈는 여전히 내 눈을 피한채로 보일듯말듯 고개를 저었다.

1000638743.english: - At my words, Muse shook her head vigorously.
1000638743.korean: - 내 말에 뮤즈는 세차게 고개를 저었다.

1000638744.english: - The breeze blew her bangs back, briefly revealing her bare face. Muse hurriedly pulled her bangs back down, but Boryeon didn’t miss the opportunity.
1000638744.korean: - 그 바람에 앞머리가 떠올라 맨얼굴이 살짝 드러났다. 뮤즈는 황급히 다시 앞머리를 끌어내렸지만, 보련은 그 틈을 놓치지 않았다.

1000638745.english: Hey~ miss, you're a total beauty!

1000638746.english: Especially your eyes—they're soooo pretty, it's a waste to keep hiding them~ Let's at least do something about those bangs, okay?
1000638746.korean: 특히 눈이 엄~청 예쁘신데, 그렇게 가리고 계시면 아깝죠~ 우리, 앞머리만 어떻게 해봐요. 네?

1000638748.english: - It’s not like they have to take the stage in a flashy way, but I’m definitely looking forward to it.
1000638748.korean: - 꼭 화려한 모습으로 무대에 오를 필요는 없겠지만, 기대가 되는 것도 사실이고.

1000638750.english: – Hesitating at my words, Muse slowly lowered the hands that had been guarding her bangs like a CT-103 Fortress.
1000638750.korean: - 내 말에 잠시 망설이던 뮤즈는 철통같이 앞머리를 방어하던 손을 천천히 내렸다.

1000638751.english: Okay! Then please have a seat here first~

1000638757.english: Do you have a style you want~?

1000638759.english: – At BoRyeon's question, Muse looked up at me with teary eyes as if asking for help.
1000638759.korean: - 보련의 물음에 뮤즈는 도움을 요청하듯 글썽이는 눈으로 나를 올려다봤다.

1000638761.english: – When I looked away, Muse's two eyes visible through her bangs were filled with despair.
1000638761.korean: - 내가 딴청을 부리자 앞머리 사이로 살짝 보이는 뮤즈의 두 눈이 절망으로 물들었다.

1000638763.english: ...I-I... don't really know much about that...

1000638764.english: I think it's been somewhat maintained... do you use conditioner?
1000638764.korean: 그럭저럭 관리는 된 것 같은데... 린스 쓰세요?

1000638767.english: If you're unsure, should I wait a bit longer~?

1000638769.english: - ...If I keep messing around, I'm going to make her cry. I guess I should help her out.

1000638770.english: You really have an eye for this~

1000638771.english: Just doing that will change your whole look. Here.
1000638771.korean: 그러기만 해도 인상이 확 바뀔거예요. 자.

1000638773.english: – When BoRyeon swept the bangs to both sides, Muse's bare face was revealed.
1000638773.korean: - 보련이 앞머리를 양 옆으로 치우자, 뮤즈의 맨얼굴이 드러났다.

1000638774.english: – A pair of transparent eyes with slightly drooping corners looked up at me cautiously.
1000638774.korean: - 끝이 살짝 처진, 투명한 눈동자 한 쌍이 나를 조심스레 올려다봤다.

1000638776.english: I was going to cut the bangs, but actually, this style suits you better, don't you think?
1000638776.korean: 앞머리를 자를까 했는데, 오히려 이런 스타일이 더 어울리겠는데요?

1000638777.english: Let's redo the dye and just trim some volume... hmm...
1000638777.korean: 염색 다시 하고, 숱만 좀 정리하고... 음...

1000638778.english: Miss, how about earrings or something?

1000638779.korean: 그, 그런 건 해본 적 없어서...

1000638780.english: Doesn't it hurt when you get them pierced...?

1000638785.english: - When she saw the idol's outfit hanging on the hanger, Muse's eyes widened.
1000638785.korean: - 옷걸이에 걸린 아이돌 의상을 보여주자 뮤즈의 눈이 동그래졌다.

1000638787.english: ...Is it okay for me to wear something like that?

1000638793.english: You were truly a Cinderella. I expected it, but I didn't think you'd shine that much...
1000638793.korean: 그야말로 신데렐라였어요. 예상은 했지만, 그렇게나 빛날 줄이야...

1000638794.english: You're too kind~ Then I'll go prepare styling for the others.
1000638794.korean: 별말씀을요~ 그럼 저는 다른 분들 스타일링 준비하러 가볼게요.

1000638795.english: If you want a massage, just ask~?

1000638797.english: – After BoRyeon left, a little while later, the captain's office door opened as if taking over.
1000638797.korean: - 보련이 돌아가고 잠시 후, 교대하듯 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000638800.english: – Muse entered cautiously, looking completely transformed.

1000638801.english: Ugh... if you keep looking like that...

1000638802.english: – All our members are beautiful without exception, but this dazzling transformation really feels new.
1000638802.korean: - 우리 대원들은 누구하나 빠질 것 없이 전부 예쁘지만, 이런 눈부신 변신은 역시 새롭게 느껴진다.

1000638805.english: Producer! Let's start practice right now—Whoa?!

1000638810.english: You look like a completely different person?

1000638817.english: Look at her. It seems like she’s already married the producer and had a baby in her head.
1000638817.korean: 얘 봐라. 머릿속에서 이미 프로듀서랑 결혼하고 애까지 낳았나본데.

1000638823.english: Hi~ Your outfit and hair go really well together.

1000638826.english: It has finally become a complete unit.

1000638827.english: Along with the new songs, I need to consistently practice the existing ones as well.
1000638827.korean: 새로운 곡과 더불어, 기존 곡들도 꾸준히 연습해야겠어요.

1000638828.english: Yeah! Let's go practice right now!

1000638831.english: Of course. Hmm, since the group song will be 7 members, I'll have to rearrange the positions...
1000638831.korean: 당연하죠. 흠, 단체곡은 7명이 될테니, 포지션을 다시 짜야...

1000638832.english: Muse, come here for a moment. Let's go together.
1000638832.korean: 뮤즈, 잠깐만 이리로. 저랑 같이 가죠.

1000638836.english: You're here? Wait just a bit.

1000638840.english: Say hello. This is BoRyeon who's in charge of styling.

1000638842.english: Yeah. I think so too. You're already pretty now.
1000638842.korean: 응. 나도 그렇게 생각해. 지금도 예쁘니까.

1000638843.english: Wait, wait. Aren't you guys going on a mission soon?

1000638844.english: Yeah. Sorry I couldn't do more.

1000638845.english: Do you happen to know how to do massages?
1000638845.korean: 혹시 마사지 같은 것도 할 줄 알아?

1000638846.english: Okay. I'd appreciate that. But instead of just receiving it, I'd like you to explain how to do it.
1000638846.korean: 응. 부탁할게. 근데 그냥 받는 게 아니라, 어떻게 하는 건지 알려줬으면 좋겠어.

1000638847.english: I want to do it for the other members.

1000638855.english: Uh... hi? It's been a while.

1000638857.english: If you really don't want to, you can stop now...

1000638858.english: How about trying it once first?

1000638859.english: ...Looks fun, I'll watch for a bit.

1000638861.english: My body's stiff, should I stretch a bit...

1000638862.english: Like I said earlier, let's move the bangs aside.

1000638864.english: If it's simple, I think it would suit you.

1000638865.english: Then please take care of that too. And this.

1000638866.english: This is Muse's outfit. Same concept as Sky Knights.

1000638867.english: Alright. I'll be looking forward to it.

1000638869.english: Yeah. I'll ask again next time.

1000638873.english: Good job. I'll come watch again.

1000638875.english: How about moving your bangs aside like we talked about earlier?
1000638875.korean: 일단 아까 말대로 앞머리를 치워보는게 어때?

1000638876.english: - The practice room set up on the Orca.

1000638877.english: - The Sky Knights are still engrossed in practice.

1000638878.english: P-22 Harpyia is working hard to keep up with the choreography, albeit a quarter of a beat behind the other members.
1000638878.korean: - 하르페이아는 다른 대원들보다 반의반 박자 정도씩 늦게나마 열심히 안무를 따라가고 있다.

1000638879.english: - I think it was about two beats last time... That's a huge improvement.
1000638879.korean: - 저번에는 두 박자 정도였던 것 같은데... 장족의 발전이군.

1000638880.english: Including P-22 Harpyia, the singing and choreography of the other members are incomparably more stable than when I saw them last time.
1000638880.korean: - 하르페이아를 포함해, 다른 대원들의 가창과 안무는 저번에 봤을때와는 비교도 안될정도로 안정적이다.

1000638881.english: - EB-48G Hraesvelgr... is still smiling as he looks at the squad members.

1000638882.english: - Since you are the type to be very decisive at work, you probably have your own reasons, but...
1000638882.korean: - 일은 똑부러지게 하는 성격이니까 나름대로 생각은 있겠지만...

1000638883.english: - I waited for the right timing and went into the practice room.
1000638883.korean: - 적당히 타이밍을 보다가 연습실 안으로 들어갔다.

1000638886.english: Oh, wait a moment. P-29 Lindwurm has been sweating a lot, so I'll give you a hug a little later.
1000638886.korean: 앗, 잠깐만요. 린티 지금 땀 많이 흘렸으니까, 조금 이따가 안아드릴게요~

1000638888.english: Whether pushed to her limit or not, as soon as P-22 Harpyia saw me, she weakly clung to me.
1000638888.korean: - 한계에 몰린건지, 하르페이아는 나를 보자마자 힘없이 안겨들었다.

1000638889.english: It is just as the producer said.

1000638890.english: If things continue like this, it will surely be a wonderful performance.

1000638891.english: I, I am practicing in my own way.
1000638891.korean: 저, 저는 제 나름대로 연습하고 있습니다.
